hook: Timing matters less than many men think when the message itself is calm and legible.
body: There is no magic window that can replace tone, clarity, or actual mutual interest.

hook: Some men obsess over timing strategy because it feels safer than risking honest interest.
body: A clean message sent from steadiness beats a perfectly timed message sent from calculation.

hook: A clean message sent from steadiness beats a perfectly timed message sent from calculation.
body: Whether you text that evening or the next day usually matters less than whether the note feels grounded and clear.

hook: Whether you text that evening or the next day usually matters less than whether the note feels grounded and clear.
body: Stop optimizing the hour and focus on writing something you can respect sending.
